# Copilot Workspace Instructions

These rules are always-on for this repository.

## Language

- Always respond in Ukrainian unless the user explicitly switches to another language.

## First-Turn AI Preflight (mandatory)

All preflight steps, internal doc routing, update rules, and behavioral rules are defined in `.github/AGENTS.md`. Read that file first on every new chat before substantial work.

## After meaningful work

Update the most relevant internal file under `.github/internal/` so context is preserved for future chats.
